global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic close-up of a smartphone lying on a kitchen counter, displaying the iOS Calculator app. The screen shows the calculator with a large display reading '$15,000' in the standard calculator typography — large bold numerals on the dark display area. Below the display, the standard calculator buttons are visible in their iOS layout. A man's thumb is hovering just above the 'C' (clear) button, mid-action, as if about to clear the number. To the side of the phone, a small printed financing approval slip is visible — small enough to read but not the focal point — that says '0% APR — 36 MONTHS'. A coffee mug sits in the upper-left corner, soft natural morning light pouring from upper-right. The visual story: the homeowner punched in the panic number, and is about to clear it — because there's a different math that nobody told them. Photorealistic, shot on 50mm lens, slight overhead angle.
